The Global Standard in Sustainable Fiber.

From organic cotton fields to precision-engineered yarns, Worldcot International bridges the gap between raw natural resources and premium textile manufacturing.

Primary Sourcing

Raw Cotton

Our premium selections include Conventional, GOTS Organic, Regenagri, and Primemark certified fibers. Specializing in Mcu5, S6, and DCH varieties for superior tensile strength.

Inquire Now arrow_forward
verified GOTS eco Regenagri

Cotton Yarn

A comprehensive range of counts and types engineered for global textile manufacturing, ensuring consistency in every spool.

Inquire Now chevron_right

Premium Fabrics

Sourcing of high-grade textile materials for fashion and industrial applications, maintaining strict quality assurance protocols.

Inquire Now chevron_right

Agro & Food

Reliable supply of grains, pulses, and essential oils sourced from sustainable global networks.

Inquire Now
recycling
Circular Economy

Cotton Waste

Specialized materials including flat strips and industrial-grade waste for eco-conscious recycling and production lines.

Inquire Now chevron_right

Our Quality Assurance

verified_user

Traceable Sourcing

Every bale of cotton is traced back to its origin, ensuring ethical labor and sustainable agricultural practices.

biotech

Laboratory Testing

Advanced HVI testing for fiber length, micronaire, and strength to meet precise manufacturing requirements.

public

Global Logistics

Streamlined supply chain solutions spanning across continents with timely delivery and port-to-port security.

Worldcot International

Leading the global cotton trade with integrity, sustainability, and unparalleled quality standards for over three decades.
